title: T Level results: academic year 2024 to 2025 (provisional)
body: "This statistics release provides summary data on the number of students completing T Levels, as reported to the Department for Education through the manage T Level results service.  Data includes:   provisional outcomes for the fourth cohort of T Level students, who started in September 2023 revised outcomes for the third cohort of students, who started in September 2022   T Levels are an alternative to A levels, apprenticeships and other 16 to 19 courses. Equivalent in size to 3 A levels, a T Level focuses on vocational skills and can help students into skilled employment, apprenticeships, college or university.  Find out more about how T Levels developed. "
